title: diasapheo #1285
definition:
1) to make clear or plain, to explain, unfold, declare
 2) of things done, to declare i.e. to tell, announce, narrate
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to make clear or plain, to explain, unfold, declare
 2) of things done, to declare i.e. to tell, announce, narrate

    NASB:  to make clear, explain fully:
